svg.title: MX Anywhere 3 / 3S — LinguaX slot layout
svg.desc: Top-down photo of the MX Anywhere 3 / 3S with LinguaX-mappable slots labelled: M wheel click, SM scroll-mode key, S1 and S2 side buttons. The main plates carry L / R main clicks. Wheel tilt (WL / WR) is not exposed as a LinguaX slot on the Anywhere line.

g.text: wheel tilt · not a slot on Anywhere

svg.text: MX Anywhere 3 / 3S — 4 configurable slots (M · SM · S1 · S2)
